description: Approved field-layout golden reference templates for Yeeflow custom Data List forms. These templates are used inside Data List Form Layouts v1.1 section_content_area slots to display current-record fields in responsive Grid layouts.

templates.displayName: Data List Form Fields Grid v1.1
allowedEditableAreas: Column count and column sizing on form_grid_fields_wrapper or nested field-group grids
Column span on field controls and grouping containers, bounded by the parent Grid's column count
Dynamic display rules on grouped Container/Grid controls
lockedAreas: Root wrapper identity and control type

defaultResponsiveColumns.tablet: less than or equal to PC/laptop column count

templates.appPlanUse: For every generated custom Data List New/Edit/View form that displays current list fields, select data_list_form_fields_grid_v1_1 for each field group. The App Plan should describe group purpose, fields included, desktop/tablet/mobile column counts, full-row field controls, and dynamic-display grouping needs without generated runtime IDs or JSON payloads.

rules.fieldMargin: Every generated Data List field control inside form_grid_fields_wrapper must set margin to zero.
rules.fullRowControls: Multiple line, Rich text, and Sub list controls must span the full parent Grid width on every responsive breakpoint.
rules.gridCellContent: A Grid cell may contain one direct control. When multiple controls are needed in one cell, place a Container or nested Grid in that cell and put the controls inside it.
rules.responsiveColumns: PC/laptop columns should be 2 or 3, tablet columns must not exceed PC/laptop columns, and mobile columns should be 1.
rules.placement: When used inside data-list-form-layouts-v1.1, form_grid_fields_wrapper must be placed only inside section_content_area. Multiple content_card_wrapper groups may each contain one form_grid_fields_wrapper for grouped fields.
